label: API design standards
description: API design guidance for REST services.
value:
## API Design Standards

- Use meaningful HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT/PATCH, DELETE.
- Consistent status codes: 200/201, 400, 401, 403, 404, 500.
- Keep error responses consistent with a JSON error schema.
- Validate inputs at the API boundary, not downstream.
- Use pagination for large collections and return total counts when helpful.
- Version APIs explicitly in the path or headers.
